---
title: "Networking"
---
```{=html}
<style>
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Nunito:wght@400;600;700&family=PT+Sans:wght@400;700&display=swap');
body { font-family: 'PT Sans', sans-serif; }
h1, h2, h3, h4 { font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif; }
</style>
```


Notes on network design, architecture, and analysis. Spans formal study toward professional certifications and applied work bridging networking with data science and machine learning.

## Areas of Study

### [CCDE Written](ccde-written/)
Study notes prepared for the Cisco Certified Design Expert (CCDE) Written exam. Covers enterprise network design across campus, data center, WAN, security, automation, multicast, wireless, and service architectures.
